title: geranium pilosum var. retrorsum
intro: Geranium pilosum var. retrorsum, also known as the hairy geranium, is a perennial plant that belongs to the geranium family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin issues, and inflammation due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The hairy geranium is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are known to have health benefits such as reducing pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the hairy geranium is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
